raw_consumer_statement: Various items were returned to XXXX XXXX XXXX, vendor, and full refund was received. Retroactive changes occurred affecting my vendor account and my credit card, which shouldn't have affected with my credit card without notifying me. Instead I was not contacted and refunds for some items were reversed. Such refunds that were reversed were listed for both vendor and credit card company as disputed amounts. Credit card company was provided such information but has again remained unresponsive. Timely delivery of a response is still not occurring. I'm not even receiving acknowledgement of complaint within thirty days without filing a complaint or calling to complain.
